## Summary

## Verification

- [ ] `npm test`
- [ ] `npm run validate:skill`
- [ ] `npm run eval:trigger`
- [ ] `npm run export:ir`
- [ ] `npm run secret:scan`

## Safety Boundary

- [ ] No VPN/proxy evasion, geofence bypass, KYC/payment misrepresentation, CAPTCHA bypass, or fingerprint evasion was added.
- [ ] No secrets, cookies, tokens, browser profiles, or account data were committed.
